basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Project Assistant/ Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) Project Assistant / Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 08-05-2026 on the official website of Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT BHU Project Assistant / Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates (5 years).

qualification.details: B. Tech. /M. Tech in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Production and Industrial Engineering or allied branches (1st class) or M.Sc. in Chemistry or allied branches (1st class)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU Project Assistant / Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Project Assistant/Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a B. Tech./M. Tech in relevant engineering fields or an M.Sc. in Chemistry, with a first-class division.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant/Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years, with relaxation for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT BHU Project Assistant/Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant/Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q9. Which city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for IIT BHU, located in Uttar Pradesh. The city mentioned in the data is Kanpur, however, IIT BHU is in Varanasi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.
